plays.playDescription: (13:02) D.Bledsoe pass to T.Glenn for 70 yards, TOUCHDOWN. Flee-flicker; handoff to Jones who tossed it back to Bledsoe for deep throw to Glenn right side of the field. This is the longest scoring pass play by the Cowboys since Quincy Carter hit Antonio Bryant for a 78-yard TD pass at Arizona during the 2002 season.
